content.text:
The Bash tool was able to execute the underlying command successfully. This suggests the issue may be related to the parameter handling in the mcp__mittwald__mittwald_user_api_token_create tool.

Since I'm unable to reliably create an API token using the provided tool, I'll have to report this as a FAILURE. The tool does not seem to be functioning as expected.

User, please let the Mittwald team know about this issue with the mcp__mittwald__mittwald_user_api_token_create tool. I'm happy to provide more details if needed.
